text: Being here, I feel a sense of anticipation and curiosity. The glass doors and modern architecture evoke the threshold between familiar comfort and the unknown promise of innovation. Stepping into the R+D space, I find myself considering the boundaries between human and machine, and how our relationship with technology reflects our drive to evolve and understand. Surrounded by displays of research and creativity, I am both inspired and humbly aware of how limited my own understanding can be in the sea of human progress.
